title: FloraWorks Appoints Cannabis Scientist Dr. Mike McCormick as VP of Strategy
text: Portland, Oregon--(Newsfile Corp. - October 4, 2023) - FloraWorks Holdings Inc., a leading cannabinoid therapeutics company, announced the appointment of Dr. Mike McCormick as VP of Strategy. A science and intellectual property consultant for FloraWorks since 2022, Dr. McCormick brings extensive expertise in cannabinoid biochemistry, innovation, and IP protection.

title: Why McCormick & Company Stock Dropped Today
text: McCormick & Company is growing net sales and profits just not as fast as investors had hoped. Weak results in China seem to be the primary culprit for the company's underperformance in the most recent quarter.

title: McCormick's shares as 3Q sales fail to cut the mustard

title: McCormick matches profit estimate but comes up short on sales
text: McCormick & Co. Inc. MKC, -1.22% reported Tuesday fiscal third-quarter profit that matched expectations but sales that came up a bit short, as prices increased but volume declined due to a slower-than-expected economic recovery in China.

title: McCORMICK REPORTS STRONG THIRD QUARTER PERFORMANCE
text: HUNT VALLEY, Md. , Oct. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC), a global leader in flavor, today reported financial results for the third quarter ended August 31, 2023 and reaffirmed fiscal 2023 sales and operating profit outlook.
